name: Medium Table
description: Figures arranged around a shared surface — table, counter, or bar.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Figures gathered around a surface, close framing.
{setting}. A shared table — figures on the near side, surface between them and camera.
{setting}. An intimate grouping around a central object, medium crop.

2: {subject}, left side of the surface, facing right.
{subject}, right side of the surface, facing left.
3: {subject}, center, behind the surface, facing forward.

background_pool: A small café table with a marble surface, an espresso machine steaming behind the counter, shelves of jars and packages along the back wall, morning light through a large front window casting warm tones, the background slightly soft

A rustic farmhouse dining table of scarred wood, a pitcher of water and scattered bread between the figures, a kitchen visible through a doorway with copper pots hanging, warm interior light and whitewashed walls
A polished wooden bar top, bottles arranged on glass shelves behind, a mirror reflecting the room, barstools and brass footrails, the warm amber glow of pendant lights overhead
A cluttered workshop table covered in tools, parts, and half-finished projects, a desk lamp casting a pool of warm light, pegboard with hanging tools on the wall behind, sawdust on the surface
action_pool: wrapping both hands around a warm cup
gesturing with a fork while talking
examining a small object in their hands
leaning back, cup in one hand
pouring from a pitcher or pot
resting their chin on their hand
wiping their hands on a cloth
passing something across to the other
